name: happyskills-design
description: HappySkills skill design and quality — author new skills, audit existing ones, update from session learnings, and create kits with full Claude Code spec + HappySkills conventions.

npm.description: npm package manager (ships with Node.js, used to invoke npx happyskills)

install.darwin: Ships with Node.js — install via brew install node
install.linux: Ships with Node.js — install via nvm
install.win32: Ships with Node.js — install via winget install OpenJS.NodeJS
